[[BLOCK:slide49_shape1]]
• In traditional Ordinary Least Squares Regression (OLS Regression) (普通最小二乘回归 (OLS Regression)), p-values are used to determine whether variables are significant.  
• The Elastic Net (弹性网络 (Elastic NET)) model does not directly provide p-values or measures of statistical significance. Instead, we rely on the coefficients and their magnitudes to infer the importance of predictors.  
• The rightmost table displays the coefficient estimates.
